title: Military Armors
description: Adds armor for gun mods. Can be used in a modpack that requires gun combat on newer version of the game.
body:
Adds Dessert, Camo, and Spec-ops armor. Craft these new armors with the new ore, steel and cloth made from wool. These new armors are stronger than diamond and provide knockback resistance.This can be a great mod to pair with a mod like Mr. Crayfish's gun mod. You can feel like a soldier with your friends or play with it in survival. Comment if you have any ideas that you would want to be added. You should also use JEI to easily find crafting recipes or look in the images tab for all recipes.

Showcase - https://youtu.be/Nw9oIEI_jNs
